creator: Yoshio.Mita@isen.fr
text:
japanese/vflib, known as Vector Font Library, is mandatory to build 
Japanese environment;  this port have left behind current FreeType port.

Without vflib, Japanese FreeBSD colleagues are unable to build printing
environment, because gs/xdvi/dvi2ps depends on vflib.  Hope this patch is 
applied before port freeze for 2.2.7-RELEASE

Fix: 

Apply patch:

wcarchive.cdrom.com:/.25/FreeBSD/incoming/vflib-980716.diff.gz

and make install.
